title: Wimmerella bifida

Traditional medicine has employed Wimmerella bifida for its health benefits, which include treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Wimmerella bifida is commonly used to make herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into traditional remedies like cough syrups and expectorants.
